items.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

items.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
items.summary: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

items.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 6000萬顆星如金沙！史上最細緻「華麗」銀河系  歐幾里得望遠鏡拍下
